Name: bUseDirect3D9ExIfAvailable
Description: An extension only available in Windows Vista and newer.

Name: iMaximumFrameLatency
Description: Works only if Direct3D9Ex is enabled. The maximum number of back buffer frames that a driver can queue. The value defaults to 3, but can range from 1 to 16. A value of 0 will reset latency to the default.

Name: iPreset
Description: 0 - custom, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high, 4 - very high

Name: bForceVSync
Description: Prevents screen tearing, can cause input lag.

Name: iAnisotropicFiltering
Description: Reduces blur on distant surfaces. Values: 0, 2, 4, 8, 16.

Name: bInstancing
Description: Method that renders multiple copies of a mesh with the same material in a single draw call. Each copy of the mesh is called an instance. This is useful for drawing things that appear multiple times in a scene, for example, trees or bushes.

Name: iMultisampleType
Description: Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on solid objects.

Name: bAlphaToCoverage
Description: Transparency Antialiasing (MSAA). Smooths out jagged edges on semi-transparent objects.

Name: iShaderQuality
Description: 0 - abysmal, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high

Name: bDynamicMeshBatching
Description: For small enough meshes, this transforms their vertices on the CPU, groups similar vertices together, and renders them in one draw call. Requires "Combine meshes" or "Combine low-poly meshes" flag for material in brf.

Name: iMaxNumBatchedMeshVertices
Description: Vertices limit for collection size.

Name: iMaxNumAutoBatchMeshVertices
Description: Vertices limit for mesh with "Combine low-poly meshes" material flag.

Name: iTextureQuality
Description: 0 - abysmal, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high

Name: iVertexBufferSizeRegularStatic
Description: Modders may adjust these large enough so that the game will not need to restore buffers during the game. However keeping them excessively large will reduce performance in most systems.

Name: iDiffuseMapMinFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iDiffuseMapMagFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iDiffuseMapMipFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation

Name: iDiffuseMapMaxAnisotropy
Description: limit for anisotropic filtering

Name: iNormalMapMinFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iNormalMapMagFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iNormalMapMipFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation

Name: iNormalMapMaxAnisotropy
Description: limit for anisotropic filtering

Name: iSpecularMapMinFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iSpecularMapMagFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iSpecularMapMipFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation

Name: iSpecularMapMaxAnisotropy
Description: limit for anisotropic filtering

Name: iEnvironmentMapMinFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iEnvironmentMapMagFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: iEnvironmentMapMipFilter
Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation

Description: 0 - filtering disabled, 1 - nearest, 2 - linear interpolation, 3 - anisotropic

Name: bUseBorderedShadowSampler
Description: use D3DTADDRESS_BORDER instead D3DTADDRESS_CLAMP for shadow map sampler
